name: sub-bridge-cli
description: Local OpenAI Responses bridge for subscription-backed coding agents.

scripts.check: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && npm run build && node --check dist/cli.mjs
scripts.ci: npm run build && npm run check && bash -n install.sh && bash -n uninstall.sh && bash -n scripts/test-install.sh && npm test && npm run test:install && npm run smoke
scripts.smoke: node dist/cli.mjs --help && node dist/cli.mjs targets && node dist/cli.mjs models
